frontend_service.notes: getAnalysisResult constructs a narrowed object that OMITS balanced_systems_v1, interpretation_display_layer_v1, and risk_assessment. This is the confirmed root cause bug.

consumer_components.notes: Page reads balanced_systems_v1 (line 144), interpretation_display_layer_v1 (line 574), risk_assessment (lines 688-690). Components exist and correctly consume fields from currentAnalysis.

backend_route_get_result.notes: GET /result endpoint calls build_analysis_result_dto(raw) at line 351, which correctly emits all three fields.

primary_hypothesis.notes: Frontend mapping layer drops fields. Backend DTO correctly emits all three; frontend service constructs a hand-picked object omitting them. Fix: replace narrowed object construction with a spread of the full result plus explicit status override.

stop_conditions.notes: Backend emits fields (STOP 1 clear). Bug is frontend omission not null backend data (STOP 2 clear). Fix requires only frontend mapping change (STOP 3 clear). Bounded repair is possible (STOP 4 clear). Issue is mapping omission (STOP 5 clear). Repo confirms hypothesis (STOP 6 clear).

advisory_risk_assessment.notes: risk_assessment is hardcoded to {} in the stored dict (line 230). build_analysis_result_dto propagates it as an empty dict. After frontend fix, risk_assessment will reach the page but contain no entries. The results page renders it conditionally (Object.entries check), so it will render silently empty — not broken but not populated. This is pre-existing backend behaviour, outside sprint scope. Cursor should confirm in browser during verification.

behavioural_scope.notes: change_type=MIXED is correct. Sprint modifies frontend mapping behaviour (service layer) but does not touch Intelligence Core. No backend analytics/pipeline logic in scope. Determinism: mapping is deterministic pass-through. No output generation logic changed. Regression targets: IDL survives API mapping into store, balanced_systems_v1 survives API mapping into store.

forbidden_files.notes: No .codex/, .vscode/, AGENTS.md in scope. No Intelligence Core files in scope. No control-plane scripts in scope.

duplicate_authority.notes: Current narrowed mapping is the single mapping path. Prompt Rule 3 satisfied by repair: replace narrowed object with spread, not by adding a second path alongside it.
